title: Project Atlas - Cloud Migration
description: Migrate the entire Project Atlas infrastructure from on-premise to AWS cloud. This includes all microservices, databases, and supporting infrastructure. The migration must achieve zero-downtime and maintain backward compatibility with existing API consumers.

title: Implement API Gateway with Kong
description: Set up Kong API Gateway for centralized routing, authentication, and rate limiting. Configure upstream services, health checks, and SSL termination. Include rate limiting at 1000 requests/minute per service.

title: OAuth 2.0 Authentication Integration
description: Implement OAuth 2.0 with PKCE for web applications and Client Credentials for service-to-service auth. Use JWT tokens with RSA-256 signing. Includes token refresh with 24-hour sliding expiration. Scopes: read, write, admin, service.

title: Kubernetes Cluster Expansion
description: Add 6 new worker nodes to the Kubernetes cluster to support dual-system operation during migration. Update Terraform configurations and deployment manifests.

title: Connection Pool Exhaustion Under Load
description: Production incident: Analytics query running without connection pool limits caused API latency spike. P95 jumped from 200ms to 2.5s. Fix: Added connection pool limits to all database queries and monitoring dashboards.

title: Database Migration Scripts
description: Create Alembic migration scripts for schema changes required by OAuth integration. Must include both upgrade and downgrade paths. Handle existing session tokens during transition period with compatibility layer.

title: Update Deployment Guide and Runbook
description: Update deployment guide and runbook for new cluster topology with expanded Kubernetes nodes. Include blue-green deployment procedures, rollback instructions, and monitoring setup.

title: Release 3.2 Integration Testing
description: End-to-end integration testing for Release 3.2 including API Gateway, OAuth, new dashboard, and all migrated services. Must validate backward compatibility with existing API consumers.

title: CORS Configuration Too Permissive
description: API Gateway CORS configuration allows all origins (*). Must be restricted to specific allowed origins before production deployment. Identified during architecture review.

title: Circuit Breaker Implementation
description: Implement circuit breaker pattern in API Gateway for all upstream services. Prevents cascade failures during partial outages. Recommended during architecture review.

title: New Dashboard Frontend
description: Complete redesign of the analytics dashboard with real-time metrics, interactive charts, and customizable widgets. Built with React and integrates with the new API Gateway.

title: Load Testing Infrastructure
description: Set up load testing infrastructure using k6 for the migration cutover. Must simulate production-level traffic (10,000 concurrent users) and validate performance under dual-system operation.
